SCROLL
/01 — work

Things I built that shipped.

Five core projects showcasing design-engineering fusion.

/02 — about

Hi, I'm Ayush.

Frontend developer based in Vadodara, Gujarat, four years in — building production React and Next.js apps, shipping cross-platform mobile with React Native, and obsessing over the details that separate good UIs from great ones.

I care deeply about the millisecond an interface responds. About the gap between what a designer intended and what a developer shipped. About closing that gap to zero.

Currently engineering medical dashboards and payment systems at Kraftbase — the kind of work where a rendering glitch isn't just ugly, it costs someone.

/03 — skills

The toolbox.

Tools I reach for daily. Levels are honest, not aspirational.

/04 — timeline

A short history.

2026 →
Software Engineer
@ Kraftbase
Pixel-perfect UIs with GSAP, AI-driven EEG dashboard, Stripe escrow system, HLS.js video sync for clinical workflows.
2024–25
Frontend Developer
@ Mera Farmhouse
Cross-platform React Native + Next.js agri-marketplace. Led App Store & Play Store releases — 100% on-time, 30% faster delivery.
2021–24
Software Developer
@ Team Geek Solutions
Storybook component library across 3 products, interview automation UI, 25% latency reduction via optimized API integrations.
2017–20
BA English Literature
@ Magadh University
Foundation in analytical thinking, communication, and writing — the other half of good interface work.

/08 — testimonials

Kind words

Ayush has an exceptional ability to bridge design and engineering—his pixel-perfect implementation of complex animations sets a new standard.
Sarah ChenDesign Director, Forma
Not just a frontend engineer; Ayush thinks like a designer. His contributions to our design system were architectural.
Priya SharmaHead of Design, Razorpay
The performance and delight he brings to every interaction is remarkable. Rare combination of technical depth and aesthetic sensibility.
Karan PatelCTO, Postman
